nodes.name: 稀树草原

nodes.name: Moltoni's warbler
nodes.summary: Moltoni's warbler（Moltoni's warbler，学名 Curruca subalpina），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括灌丛、稀树草原。
locations: 地中海森林、疏林和灌叢

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: This species is native to Italy and islands of the Tyrrhenian Sea

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Moltoni's warbler breeds around the Tyrrhenian Sea in the Mediterranean Sea on the Balearic Islands, Corsica, Sardinia and in northern Italy wintering in the western Sahel in between the Atlantic coast and Niger and northern Nigeria
